NOTE: the two grade-2 items only reveal themselves in the DESCRIPTION ('Dig Defence...extends the protection of any fence'; 'Secure your home gardens, PETS, chickens'). If you only embed the title, semantic will also miss them - which is exactly why you concatenate title + description.
